INSURANCE CLAIM — REFERENCE #IC-2026-44821
Date: March 3, 2026

Date of Birth: 08/12/1978

Mr. Nair filed a claim for hospitalization at Apollo Hospital, Chennai, from February 18 to February 24, 2026. He was admitted for acute pancreatitis and was treated with IV fluids, pain management using Tramadol 50mg, and nutritional support.

The attending physician, Dr. Priya Menon, confirmed that the condition was not pre-existing. Mr. Nair has a known history of hypertension managed with Amlodipine 5mg.

Total claim amount: ₹4,75,000. Payment to be credited to ICICI Bank account 0012-3398-7654.

Contact details: deepak.nair@email.com, Phone: +91-98410-55678. Registered address: 12, Thiruvalluvar Street, T. Nagar, Chennai 600017.
